examples: The higher rates have been a hindrance to economic recovery.

Associating a number as one of the qualities of a specific object is a great hindrance to the development of a true number sense.
Another day, another op-ed about how high unemployment is a hindrance to economic growth.
"We don't envisage any issue within the country posing a major hindrance to recovery, " he asserts.
